coreMeaning.en: a large non-venomous snake that kills by squeezing its prey

morphemes.meaning: 毕同（希腊神话中的大蛇，被阿波罗所杀）

derivationChain: Greek Python (mythical serpent slain by Apollo) → python → 大蟒蛇

memorySemantics.literal: python → 希腊神话中的大蛇，今指蟒蛇
memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: python → 以希腊神话大蛇命名的蟒蛇，缠绕绞杀猎物
